payload.label: coffee maker
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped black plastic drip coffee maker with stainless-steel accents and a glass carafe (handle visible on right) showing a vertical rectangular base with a small control panel; slightly blurred and photographed at approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
